title: Bibliowoods Legacy
description: Bibliowoods Legacy is an addon for Bibliocraft Legacy that adds support for modded wood types.
body:
Bibliowoods Legacy is a spiritual successor to the Bibliowoods series of mods, providing modded wood type support to [Bibliocraft Legacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/bibliocraft-legacy).

Currently supported mods include:

- [Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)
- [Allthemodium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/allthemodium)
- [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau)
- [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)
- [Forbidden and Arcanus](https://modrinth.com/mod/forbidden-arcanus)
- [GregTechCEu Modern](https://modrinth.com/mod/gregtechceu-modern)
- [Integrated Dynamics](https://modrinth.com/mod/integrated-dynamics)
- [Occultism](https://modrinth.com/mod/occultism)
- [Silent Gear](https://modrinth.com/mod/silent-gear)
- [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)
- [Undergarden](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-undergarden)

Up until version 1.21.1-1.5.0, support for [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty), [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone) and [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored) was in this mod. It has since been moved to [Bibliobiomes Legacy](https://modrinth.com/project/bibliobiomes-legacy/settings/description) due to increasing file sizes.

# Support

This mod currently supports NeoForge for 1.21.1 and upwards. There are no current plans to port to Fabric, Forge, Quilt, or any other loader. There are also no plans to backport to versions older than 1.21.1.

If you need help with using the mod, want to request support for a mod, or just want to chat, feel free to join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/jSnHGFBX2k)!
